# Master Services Agreement — Northwind Logistics & Cartwright Analytics

This Master Services Agreement (the "Agreement") governs the provision of data-analytics services
between the parties identified below.

## Parties

- **Provider** — Cartwright Analytics LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
- **Client** — Northwind Logistics Inc., a Delaware corporation.

## Definitions

- **Services** — the data-analytics and reporting work described in the Statement of Work.
- **Confidential Information** — non-public information disclosed by one party to the other.
- **Indemnity Cap** — the maximum amount recoverable for an indemnified claim.

## Obligations

The Provider shall perform the Services with reasonable skill and care, in accordance with the
applicable data-protection requirements[^gdpr]. The Client shall pay each undisputed invoice within
thirty (30) days of receipt. Each party shall hold the other's Confidential Information in confidence.

## Liability

Neither party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall exceed the fees paid in the twelve (12)
months preceding the claim.

## Authorities

[^gdpr]: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation), Art. 28.
[^ccpa]: California Consumer Privacy Act, Cal. Civ. Code sec. 1798.100 et seq.
